register.title: Palm Jumeirah Price Correction
register.description: After 50%+ appreciation since 2020, a UAE property market correction could disproportionately affect ultra-luxury Palm Jumeirah assets — typically -15% to -25% in downturns.

register.title: Building Age & Major Maintenance
register.description: Oceana Residences is 17 years old; roof, waterproofing, and lift systems approaching end of life; major building-wide refurbishment within 5–8 years.

register.title: Negative Carry — Ongoing Cash Cost
register.description: AED 52K/yr ($14.2K) service charge creates permanent negative carry with no income offset; cost escalates with inflation.

register.title: Nakheel Estate Management Disputes
register.description: Nakheel Communities enforces strict estate management rules; non-compliance could result in fines or restrictions on use.

register.title: UAE Property Tax Introduction
register.description: UAE has no property tax currently; any future introduction would impact running costs, though AED peg provides FX stability.

scenarios.name: Palm Market Correction –20% (Cyclical Downturn)
scenarios.verdict: Unencumbered — no LTV covenant risk. Paper loss of $425K USD. Palm Jumeirah has recovered from prior corrections; long-term hold appropriate.

scenarios.name: Rental Activation — AED 220K Annual Let
scenarios.verdict: Switching to income-producing mode converts -$14.2K/yr to +$43.8K/yr. Significant optionality value — management decision pending family usage preference.

mitigationPlan.action: Monitor Palm Jumeirah price indices quarterly; set review trigger at >15% decline from current AED 7.80M
Obtain Nakheel 5-year building maintenance schedule; budget for proportionate share of major works
